summary: Reposted Fox Business interview segment. A woman anchors from a studio against a Washington skyline backdrop. A lower-third reads 'KELLY LOEFFLER | U.S. SMALL BUSINESS ADMIN ADMINISTRATOR' and 'TRUMP TO MEET W/ OVER 100 SMALL BUSINESS OWNERS,' with market tickers for Dow futures, crude oil, and currencies. The audio is reporting that small-business owners will meet the President during National Small Business Week.

script.scene: Woman anchors from a studio before a DC skyline; chyron 'KELLY LOEFFLER | U.S. SMALL BUSINESS ADMIN ADMINISTRATOR / TRUMP TO MEET W/ OVER 100 SMALL BUSINESS OWNERS.'
